title: Corality
description: Corality adds new variants to coral in Minecraft.
body:
**Corality** is a resource pack that adds variants to coral in Minecraft. Coral now has 4 random models: small (default), medium, tall and bushy. Coral fans now have a new, bigger variant.
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/corality/
